title: Support force assignments to unpacked array elements of simple types (partial #4735)

features.name: force assignment to unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a force assignment targeting an unpacked array element of logic type

features.name: release assignment to unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a release assignment targeting an unpacked array element of logic type

features.name: force assignment to multidimensional unpacked array element
features.description: Code should include a force assignment targeting a nested unpacked array element of logic type
